race.description: Ladbrokes Racing Extras In Multi Mdn Plate
race.comment: BRADFORD (1) missed the placings first up recently but was not too far from the winner when fourth over a similar trip at Geelong. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn to enjoy a nice trail just off the pace. Will prove tough to beat. JUST MAGIC (8) warmed nicely here late to grab third two weeks ago. Fitter and better third-up, just needs a smart steer from McNeil from out there. PEACE SEEKER (10) resumes and looks to have come on nicely during the break, stripping fitter for three recent jumpouts. No shock to see her play a major role fresh. PRESTIGE ZERPRISE (3) tackles the synthetic for the first time on his return from. Readied with two quiet jumpouts and is in the mix. SWIFT ENDORSEMENT (4) caught the eye fresh when flashing home into a midfield finish at Werribee but has since struggled. Keeping safe.
